Theatre Director · Regisseur

Izad
Safaeiyan

Berlin, Germany  ·  Persian & European Theatre

From the underground stages of Mashhad to the municipal theatres of Germany — a director whose work navigates the borders between censorship and freedom, shadow and presence, scream and silence.

Selected Works

Productions

2013 – 2019Iran · Mashhad & Dargaz
05.2013
Mashdi Mashalla
Traditional · Dargaz, Iran
Comedy & musical theatre with 11 performers. First production as director. 10 public performances.
Director
01.2015
5 + 1 = 9
Playwright Jafar Ghasemi · Dargaz & Torbat Heydarieh Festival
Three families, three pregnant mothers in different social conditions. A critique of economic sanctions and state oppression. ~1500 audience members across two festivals.
🥈 2nd Best Director🥇 Best Actor🥈 2nd Best Actor🥇 Best Actress
Director
01.2016
Bakereha (The Virgins)
Playwright Meysam Pourtaghi · Kavir Festival, Mashhad
Selected for Kavir Festival with jury including Dr. Qutbuddin Sadeghi and Vahid Lak. Later forced to rename due to Islamic censorship.
🥈 Nina Goodarzi🥈 Mahla Zare🥇 Best Music
Director
10.2016
The Scream Impression
آمپرسیون جیغ بنفش · Playwright Payam Larian · Rezvan Festival, Mashhad
60 minutes. Chaharpa Theatre Group. Political tensions from this production marked the beginning of intensified regime pressure.
🥉 Best Actress
Director
2017
Bavrhae Man (My Wings)
Playwright Meysam Pourtaghi · Misagh Festival, Neyshabur
Renamed version of Bakereha after censors banned the original title. Despite the forced change, the production won multiple awards.
🥉 3rd Best Director🥉 Best Actress🏅 Best Music
Director
10.2018
Paresch Haeye Mowazi
Playwright Payam Larian · Private space, Iran
Submitted to festival; a secret service juror declared the work an "illegal act." Rehearsed in a private space with women — deemed a violation. This marks the turning point toward exile.
Director
2018
Hekaet Natmam (Unfinished Story)
Playwright Ehsan Janemi · Mashhad Festival
Stage reading with 11 young performers. 10 public performances in Dargaz.
🥉 Best Director🥇 Best Performers🥇 Best Music🏆 Best Play
Director
02.2019
Tiger
Playwright Amir Rastegar · Dargaz (single performance)
A leopard (symbol of Iran) becomes a donkey under the regime's tamer. Single performance before arrest. Led directly to flight from Iran.
Director

Film theatre about the Iranian Revolution.

Official Profile

Stadttheater Gießen

Izad Safaeiyan wurde in Mashhad im Iran geboren. Er ist Theaterregisseur und Bühnenbildner für Schauspiel. Seine künstlerische Laufbahn begann er mit einem Schauspiel-Studium in Mashhad. Er realisierte mehrfach ausgezeichnete Inszenierungen in Städten wie Dargaz, Mashhad, Neyshabur, Quchan, Torbat Heydariyeh und Kashmar sowie Halle an der Saale.

Seine künstlerische Arbeit ist geprägt von einer kritischen Auseinandersetzung mit sozialen und politischen Themen, was im Jahr 2019 zur Flucht aus seiner Heimat führte. Seitdem lebt Safaeiyan in Deutschland und arbeitet als freier Regisseur, Regieassistent und Abendspielleiter.

Background

Education & Career

Education

1998 – 2009
Allgemeine Hochschulreife — Berufliches Gymnasium für Grafik & Design, Tehran
2009 – 2011
Studium Grafik & Design — Azaad University Tehran
2011 – 2013
Actor training — Almikarbordihonar, Mashhad. First theatre with Lal Theatre Group (Farshid Tamri)

Career Highlights

2013 – 2019
Director & Theatre Intendant, Dargaz Municipal Theatre. Acting teacher. 9 full productions and 3 short theatre works.
2019 – 2022
Fled Iran after arrest. Theatre workshops in Halberstadt asylum centre. Founded theatre group in Halle an der Saale.
2024 – 2025
Employed at Stadttheater Gießen (Season 24/25). Directing debut: "Etwas kommt mir bekannt vor".
2026 →
Freier Regisseur. Premiere: Hazfīyāt, Kellertheater Frankfurt (04.09.2026).
